series_metadata.series_description: Signature Authorizations maintained at The Ohio Department of Job and Family Services which designate specific employees to sign for the Director and or other Agency Officials.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from either date authorization/delegation is repealed, or, if needed audit purposes, date of submission of any quarterly, annual or final financial report, whichever date is later ; Electronic: from either date authorization/delegation is repealed, or, if needed audit purposes, date of submission of any quarterly, annual or final financial report, whichever date is later
